description: Draft of a deed of sale for a house. Location: Fustat. Dated: 1483 Seleucid = 1171/72 CE, under the authority of "ha-Rav ha-Gadol be-Yisraʾel" (probably Maimonides, who was at that time Head of the Jews). [...] b. Iyov acknowledges having sold a house or a portion of one located in Qaṣr al-Shamʿ to Abū l-Bayān Moshe b. Elʿazar. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: טיוטת שטר מכירה לבית, פוסטאט, 1483 לספירת השטרות (1171/72). [...] ב' איוב מודה שמכר בית בקצר אל-שמע לאבו אל-ביאן משה ב' אלעזר.
